creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Alexander Logvinov (ports@logvinov.com) wrote:

>   Please take a look on this patch with OPTIONS.

I like this more. Only fixed options checking a bit
(defined(WITH_GSTREAMER) -> !defined(WITHOUT_GSTREAMER), same for PCRE
and ASPELL).

>   As for your patch Alex. It seems you forgot to add *.mo files to pkg-plist
>   or you have WITHOUT_NLS knob? And dependence from xpm was dropped in xneur.
>   I can't find xneur-0.9.4.tar.bz2 on CENKES MASTER_SITES.

I can put it on mirror.amdmi3.ru for more availability, any objections?

>   What do you think about moving xneur to deskutils category?

Nice. It does belong there.

So, Alex, what do you think?

--
